mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, avatar_path, email, telephone, qq, create_time, update_time FROM admin WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password, avatar_path, email, telephone, qq, create_time, update_time FROM admin WHERE username = #{username} AND password = #{password}
mapper.update: UPDATE admin SET avatar_path = #{avatarPath}, email = #{email}, telephone = #{telephone}, qq = #{qq}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admin SET password = #{password}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
